---
title: "Site_Occupancy"
output: html_document
---

## Import librairies

```{r}
#importation tidyverse

library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(lubridate)

#importation des autres librairies

library(emmeans)
library(glmmTMB)
library(bbmle)

library(blme)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)

library(performance)
library(ggeffects)

library(ggsignif)

library(car)

```

## Fonctions utiles

```{r}

# Fonction de calcul des indices de surdispersion

overdisp_fun <- function(model) {
  rdf <- df.residual(model)
  rp <- residuals(model,type="pearson")
  Pearson.chisq <- sum(rp^2)
  prat <- Pearson.chisq/rdf
  pval <- pchisq(
    Pearson.chisq, 
    df=rdf, 
    lower.tail=FALSE
  )
  c(
    chisq=Pearson.chisq,
    ratio=prat,
    rdf=rdf,
    p=pval
  )
}

```
